title: Surveying victims on their experiences of the criminal justice system: feasibility study
body: "The Ministry of Justice commissioned Verian (formerly Kantar Public) to undertake a study to explore the feasibility of creating a new victim feedback mechanism.  The study consisted of a literature review, methodological review, interviews with stakeholders, and questionnaire scoping. A range of research options were developed and explored in interviews with victims.  This report covers the methodology, findings and proposals for the victim feedback mechanism. "
